self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve future Engine self-improvement quality by proving staged shared-Engine refactors preserve Discovery behavior too.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case materializes one Discovery control check inside the staged Engine verification script.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, Discovery no-drift confidence depended on ad hoc command inspection.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future shared Engine refactors will fail quickly if they alter the Discovery lane's default proof or integration behavior.

decision.rationale: The staged Engine verification is worth extending with a Discovery control path.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
